title: Junior Investment Banker at Piramal Finance South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at Piramal Finance South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Piramal Finance South Asia Partners in Faridabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Piramal Finance South Asia Partners:
Piramal Finance South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Piramal Finance South Asia Partners!
